query_normalized: collectionlora: collecting 50 effects in 1 lora via multi-teacher on-policy distillation computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (a) same-mechanism evidence and (b) independent-or-dependent variable on the same domain, as it directly studies multi-teacher knowledge distillation for LLMs—the core mechanism underlying the user's CollectionLoRA approach—even though it focuses on knowledge purification rather than LoRA specifically. For a literature review on multi-teacher distillation methods for LLMs, this would be a canonical reference that reviewers would expect to see cited.
